title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (only CC update)
scenario: "Houston" screen is displayed when earbuds are placed in charging case during a Charge Case-only 1-step DFU update
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the earbuds are connected.
3. Initiate a 1-step Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the Charge Case (CC) only.
4. Wait for the update progress to reach over 20%.
5. While the update is in progress (over 20%), place the earbuds into the charging case.
6. Observe the screen displayed on the app.
expected: The app displays the \"Houston\" screen (specific UI screen/animation indicating the update is ongoing) when the earbuds are placed into the charging case during a CC-only firmware update at over 20% progress.
